summary: Matched three Kirby ftKb_SpecialN callbacks in src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialN.c: ftKb_SpecialHi1_Anim, ftKb_SpecialAirS_Enter, and ftKb_EatJump1_Anim. The PR body claims all three were verified as 100% objdiff matches and ninja built cleanly; the bot report confirms 3 new 100% matches totaling +416 matched-code bytes.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; replaces three placeholder function markers with matched Kirby special-move callback implementations.

what_changed.change: Replaced a placeholder with a callback that checks animation completion, calls ftCommon_8007D5D4, changes motion state to ftKb_MS_SpecialAirHi2 with flags 0xA, installs efLib pause/resume hitlag callbacks, and clears fp->mv.kb.specialhi.x0.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: describes Final Cutter transition to SpecialAirHi2 when animation ends

what_changed.change: Replaced a placeholder with an aerial Hammer enter callback that initializes cmd_vars[0], applies specials_aerial_vertical_momentum once when fp->fv.kb.x64 is false, changes motion state to ftKb_MS_SpecialAirS, calls ftAnim_8006EBA4, and sets accessory4_cb to fn_800F53AC.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: describes Hammer in air and one-time vertical momentum boost

what_changed.change: Replaced a placeholder with an animation callback that, when animation frames are exhausted, gets Fighter and Kirby dat_attrs, calls ftCommon_8007D5D4, changes motion state to ftKb_MS_EatJump2 with flags 0x92, calls ftKb_SpecialN_800F9070 and ftAnim_8006EBA4, then calls ftCo_800CB110 with da->specialn_jump_height.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: describes Kirby floaty jump while holding a swallowed opponent

what_changed.change: decomp-dev bot reported 3 new matches in main/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialN: ftKb_SpecialAirS_Enter +144 bytes, ftKb_SpecialHi1_Anim +136 bytes, and ftKb_EatJump1_Anim +136 bytes, each moving from 0.00% to 100.00%.

smart_moves.text: The PR kept the match focused to one fighter translation unit and three placeholder callbacks, making the bot-reported matched-code gain easy to attribute.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists exactly 3 new matches in ftKb_SpecialN

smart_moves.text: The implementations use typed Fighter access and Kirby data attributes rather than raw pointer arithmetic for the shown state, velocity, callback, and attribute accesses.
The PR body supplied narrow verification claims, and the bot report independently recorded the same three symbols as 100% matches.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Verification says all functions verified 100% match via objdiff and ninja builds cleanly
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists 3 new matches at 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: For small fighter callback matches, a focused PR that replaces only placeholder functions in one translation unit produces clean attribution in automated match reports.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists 3 new matches in one unit

decomp_lessons.lesson: When recovering fighter callbacks, typed local roles such as Fighter* fp and dat_attrs can express gameplay state and attribute reads directly, consistent with typed-fields-over-pointer-math standards.

naming_conventions.name: da
naming_conventions.scope: ftKb_SpecialAirS_Enter and ftKb_EatJump1_Anim in this PR

naming_conventions.name: ftKb_* callback names
naming_conventions.meaning: Function names encode Kirby action/callback roles such as SpecialHi1_Anim, SpecialAirS_Enter, and EatJump1_Anim.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Summary lists ftKb_SpecialHi1_Anim, ftKb_SpecialAirS_Enter, ftKb_EatJump1_Anim
raw_diff: implementations use those symbol names

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Narrow PAD_STACK usage remained in two matched functions.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: ftKb_SpecialAirS_Enter uses PAD_STACK(8), and ftKb_EatJump1_Anim uses PAD_STACK(24). The PR body claims objdiff 100% matches and the bot report confirms both functions at 100%, but no deeper rationale for the stack padding is included.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: all functions verified 100% match via objdiff
text_corpus: bot report lists ftKb_SpecialAirS_Enter and ftKb_EatJump1_Anim at 100.00%

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Animation-end guard drives motion-state transition callbacks.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: Two recovered Anim callbacks use if (!ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining(gobj)) before changing state and doing transition-side effects.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use exact motion-state constants and flag immediates visible in the matched source.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The recovered functions call Fighter_ChangeMotionState with ftKb_MS_SpecialAirHi2 and flags 0xA, ftKb_MS_SpecialAirS and flags 0, and ftKb_MS_EatJump2 and flags 0x92.

The PR body claims objdiff 100% matches for all three, and the decomp-dev bot report lists all three as new 100.00% matches totaling +416 bytes.

source_update_candidates.title: ftKb_SpecialN.c contains Kirby special-move callbacks matched in PR #2301
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2301 changed src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialN.c to implement ftKb_SpecialHi1_Anim, ftKb_SpecialAirS_Enter, and ftKb_EatJump1_Anim, described as Kirby Final Cutter, aerial Hammer, and EatJump1/swallowed-opponent jump callbacks.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could improve path-level search for Kirby special callback ownership; curator should verify against current source before adding.

rejection_notes: Do not promote a general rule that PAD_STACK is acceptable for these patterns; the PR only shows narrow uses with match reports and no rationale.
Do not infer human reviewer approval details; no review comments or reviews were loaded.
Do not treat the PR body's gameplay descriptions as complete engine documentation beyond the three functions named in this PR.
